case_title: RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT VS. PAUL STENARD

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1134 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT A DIVISION OF RBC CAPITAL MARKETS CORPORATION, F/K/A RBC DAIN RAUSCHER INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STENARD, PAUL $461,742.11 PRINCIPAL, $860.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $197,290.77 INTEREST, $510.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $660,402.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAVID COMMINS REGARDING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT A DIVISION OF RBC CAPITAL MARKETS CORPORATION, F/K/A RBC DAIN RAUSCHER INC

CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT A DIVISION OF RBC CAPITAL MARKETS CORPORATION, F/K/A RBC DAIN RAUSCHER INC AS TO DEFENDANT STENARD, PAUL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT A DIVISION OF RBC CAPITAL MARKETS CORPORATION, F/K/A RBC DAIN RAUSCHER INC AS TO DEFENDANT STENARD, PAUL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT A DIVISION OF RBC CAPITAL MARKETS CORPORATION, F/K/A RBC DAIN RAUSCHER INC
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63533000) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT A DIVISION OF RBC CAPITAL MARKETS CORPORATION, F/K/A RBC DAIN RAUSCHER INC AS TO DEFENDANT STENARD, PAUL
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STENARD, PAUL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STENARD, PAUL
